name: M2 - Name should reject numbers
description: BUG-001 | Customer name field accepts numbers. Expected: Only alphabetic characters allowed. Actual: 'John123' is accepted without validation error. Steps: Manager → Add Customer → enter 'John123' as first name → submit. Severity: Normal | Priority: Medium | Fix: Add regex validation for alphabetic-only names
descriptionHtml: BUG-001 | Customer name field accepts numbers. Expected: Only alphabetic characters allowed. Actual: 'John123' is accepted without validation error. Steps: Manager → Add Customer → enter 'John123' as first name → submit. Severity: Normal | Priority: Medium | Fix: Add regex validation for alphabetic-only names
statusMessage: Known bug — app accepts numbers in name field without validation
